title: Primary vs secondary navigation IA pass

preflight.note: Stamped by `repopact new`; the work item was recorded before implementation began.

acceptance_criteria.text: Regroup or visually demote secondary destinations (PBQ Lab, Performance, Notes, Preferences) so Learn/Practice/Mock/Recall read as the primary study loop.
Reduce Command Center competing chrome so the weak-domain next action remains dominant without removing access to trends/mastery.
Add Mock-results remediation CTA that reuses StudyFocus domain drills, and surface PBQ discovery from Mock or Learn.
Validate keyboard/a11y still pass after nav regrouping; update getting-started if labels or hierarchy change.
